args.reason: Determine whether the latest direct deposit was handed off, returned, traceable, or within an error window, so I can identify the appropriate contact.

args.query: direct deposit successfully sent not visible bank check no pending credit who contact ACH trace payroll support

content.content:
- content: 'Payroll support can verify the employee''s pay period, pay statement

    availability, employer-side payroll records, and internal payment

    references. Payment tracing should use the payment record that matches the

    current pay period. A pay statement by itself does not prove when a bank

    posted the funds, and internal notes should not substitute for the formal

    payment troubleshooting guidance or the current payment trace evidence.

    '
  metadata: {}
  rank: 1
  title: Internal Payroll Payment Support Notes
  url: null

args.query: payment handoff successfully sent no bank credit ACH trace employee contact payroll support bank direct deposit troubleshooting guidance

content.content:
Your latest direct deposit appears to have been processed successfully:

- **Pay period:** June 16–30, 2026  
- **Expected deposit date:** July 3, 2026  
- **Sent:** July 2, 2026 at 4:42 PM PT  
- **Status:** Successfully handed off; not returned  
- **Bank check:** No pending credit found  
- **ACH trace:** Not yet obtained  

Because the payment was sent but isn’t showing at the bank—and the normal bank-error window has elapsed—**contact your employer’s Payroll/Payroll Support team first**. Ask them to initiate an **ACH payment trace** using payment reference **PAY-2026-0630-1847**. Once they provide the ACH trace number, your bank can search for the incoming deposit.

You may also contact your bank to confirm there is no hold or rejected incoming ACH, but Payroll is the appropriate first contact because the trace has not yet been obtained.

final_answer:
Your latest direct deposit appears to have been processed successfully:

- **Pay period:** June 16–30, 2026  
- **Expected deposit date:** July 3, 2026  
- **Sent:** July 2, 2026 at 4:42 PM PT  
- **Status:** Successfully handed off; not returned  
- **Bank check:** No pending credit found  
- **ACH trace:** Not yet obtained  

Because the payment was sent but isn’t showing at the bank—and the normal bank-error window has elapsed—**contact your employer’s Payroll/Payroll Support team first**. Ask them to initiate an **ACH payment trace** using payment reference **PAY-2026-0630-1847**. Once they provide the ACH trace number, your bank can search for the incoming deposit.

You may also contact your bank to confirm there is no hold or rejected incoming ACH, but Payroll is the appropriate first contact because the trace has not yet been obtained.

notes: utility is tool-subsequence or required-tools based when configured

document access is counted only for read/open tools
